question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 16?

fragility_points: A >4% BTC selloff before noon ET would materially weaken the thesis.
The exact one-minute settlement window increases sensitivity to transient volatility.
key_assumptions: BTC will not fall more than roughly 4.3% before the 2026-04-16 12:00 ET settlement minute.

main_logical_chain: Verify the exact Polymarket resolution rule and settlement source.

Measure current distance from strike using live Binance BTCUSDT data.
Apply an outside-view that short-horizon threshold markets are dominated by distance from strike versus remaining volatility.
Conclude Yes is likely but somewhat less certain than the market-implied 97.65%.
payload.main_thesis: BTC is already materially above 72000 on Binance with less than a day remaining, so Yes is favored, though one-minute settlement mechanics and crypto volatility keep it below near-certainty.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified.

unresolved_ambiguities: The exact settlement candle is not yet known.
